excerpt: When the ten intellects had attained perfection with their circles, the first intellect knew through its omniscience that these disobedient groups would no longer come from their stubbornness
source_location_hint: cosmological doctrine of the intellects and their circles

excerpt: In fact, Asher was entrusted with the task of reforming, which is his responsibility
source_location_hint: doctrine of the last person in the circle and the descent

excerpt: That is, their mistake was a momentary delay. In Arabic, it is called the blink of an eyelid, or a very slight mistake
source_location_hint: explanation of khataʾ/lamma and the nature of the slip

excerpt: All the intellects above expressed their views and favours upon Ashir and suggested to him that he should not be allowed to live in the spiritual world nor be reduced to the physical world, but that a place should be made for him between the spiritual and physical worlds
source_location_hint: the creation of the intermediate realm between spiritual and physical

excerpt: Therefore, the group was thrown out of there and placed between the spiritual world and the physical world, which is called the world of life
source_location_hint: cosmology of the world of life and its stations

excerpt: Not only were all the members of the group inviting together, but there was a positive as well as a negative invitation—to believe in the Creator Almighty and do not listen to the words of Satan
source_location_hint: the dual nature of the daʿwa in the world of life

excerpt: This is the nocturnal ascent in reality. For this reason, when Mem and Eye came into this world, it was more than the veil of the veil, because this form had been created in the world of life
source_location_hint: the Miʿraj and the ascension of the Prophet through love and proximity

excerpt: In the same way, those who became the veil for the sake of the Master also existed in the time of the Master and became the veil to save the self of the Master so that he himself could bear the pain and save his master
source_location_hint: the doctrine of the hijab and its role in protection and redemption

excerpt: The way he chose Ismail for his veil. His teeth were martyred in the battle, and the rib bone broke
source_location_hint: the Imam's authority in choosing the veils and the example of Ismail

excerpt: Then from the first intellect, this light connected with the second intellect and then descended from the seven intellects and their circles to Asher, who has been entrusted with the command of the world of physics
source_location_hint: the descent of the vertical light through the hierarchy of intellects
